title: Add Page Numbers to PDF — Offline Number Stamp
h1: Insert Page Numbers into PDF Documents Locally
description: Stamp page numbers at the header or footer of your PDF entirely in your browser. Fast and completely secure.

sections.title: Why Add Page Numbers Offline?
sections.content: Page numbers are a formatting step, not a reason to upload confidential documents to a cloud service.

steps.title: Configure Style
steps.description: Choose position, format (1/12, Page 1, i, ii…), and font.

sections.title: 100% Secure Local Processing
sections.content: All operations are performed directly on your local device. We use advanced WebAssembly technology to process your documents without ever uploading them to external servers, ensuring complete privacy.

sections.title: Internal Documents Stay Numbered & Private
sections.content: Add page numbers to contracts and confidential reports without any server involvement.

sections.title: Number a 1000-Page PDF Instantly
sections.content: Stamping page numbers locally takes milliseconds for any size document.

faqs.a: Arabic (1, 2, 3), Roman (i, ii, iii), and letter (a, b, c) formats.

faqs.q: Can I start from a custom number?
faqs.a: Yes, set any starting page number.

faqs.q: Can I skip numbering the first page?
faqs.a: Yes, set the page offset to skip cover pages.
Header-left, header-center, header-right, and same for footer.
